case_title: JORGE PEREZ VS. EQUITY OFFICCE PROPERTIES ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JORGE AS TO DEFENDANT EQUITY OFFICCE PROPERTIES 2199 FERRY BUILDING CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-15-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-14-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-23-2018

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ELIZABETH L. MARTIN, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-06-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-26-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-06-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-26-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-05-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-09-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-09-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-11-2019 AT 10:30 AM PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68608(B). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-06-2018 CONTINUED TO FEB-05-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOTE: THIS CASE IS SUBJECT TO DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B) AND THE COURT INTENDS TO NOTIFY THE STATE BAR OF ALL THE SANCTION ORDERS AS REQUIRED BY BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE 6086.7(A)(3) IF THERE IS NO COMPLIANCE AND OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE NOT PAID BY THE NEXT HEARING DATE. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear.
Notice having been given and there being no appearance or compliance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Plaintiff's counsel will also be reported to the State Bar as required by Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jun-11-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) and the Court intends to notify the State Bar of all the Sanction Orders as required by Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3) if there is no compliance and outstanding sanctions are not paid by the next hearing date. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to FEB-05-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
